scope.intent: End-to-end performance and availability test across backend API, data stores, retrieval/graph, model-backed text flows, non-MedGemma vision flow, session/history, uploads, patient portal, and frontend browser routes.
excluded: Vertex AI MedGemma text and vision endpoints
limitations: MedGemma/Vertex AI text and vision endpoints were intentionally excluded per request.
Model-backed measurements depend on OpenRouter availability/rate limits at run time.
Browser measurements were headless Chromium route loads on the local machine, not a distributed real-user monitoring sample.

streaming_tests.final_response_preview:
The most recent uploaded report (ID Z677, dated 2022‑08‑11) focuses on serologic testing for *Mycoplasma pneumoniae* and its relationship to pneumonia. It notes that:

- Pneumonia due to *Mycoplasma pneumoniae* is identified as a cause of “primary atypical pneumonia,” accounting for roughly 20 % of all pneumonia cases.
- The laboratory values you have—IgG = 12.0 and IgM = 10.0—are consistent with a recent or current infection, supporting the diagnosis of pneumonia that is already listed in your

Streaming p95 latency across sampled stream tests: 39487.37 ms
mixed_lightweight_api_load throughput: 61.907 requests/sec with p95 930.43 ms
patient_scope_guard_stream_load throughput: 526.17 requests/sec with p95 11.62 ms

All sampled endpoint, streaming, component, and browser route tests passed.
Quality gates passed: frontend production build, patient attachment pytest suite, and JSON syntax validation.
Observed issue: Backend Chroma path is startup-directory-sensitive (high).
Observed issue: One patient off-topic travel prompt missed the lightweight scope guard (medium).

observed_issues.title: Backend Chroma path is startup-directory-sensitive
observed_issues.evidence: During API chat samples the FastAPI server logged Collection [medicines], [diseases], and [symptoms] does not exist. The server was launched from api/ as documented, while src/trustmed_brain.py uses CHROMA_DB_DIR = ./data/chroma_db. Direct component testing from the repo root reached populated Chroma collections and returned 30,198 chars in 1,175.14 ms.
observed_issues.impact: Full chat responses still completed through graph/patient/model paths, but vector retrieval was effectively absent in the documented backend startup configuration.
observed_issues.bd_issue: created in this session: Fix backend Chroma path when FastAPI is launched from api/

observed_issues.title: One patient off-topic travel prompt missed the lightweight scope guard
observed_issues.evidence: chat_stream_patient_scope_guard_direct for vacation planning emitted patient_context, graph_context, retrieval, drug, synthesis, token, replace, and done events and took 40,488.42 ms. The concurrent movie prompts did short-circuit with p95 11.62 ms.
observed_issues.impact: Some unrelated patient questions can pay full model/retrieval latency instead of returning the intended scoped response.
observed_issues.bd_issue: created in this session: Tighten patient portal off-topic scope guard for travel prompts
